input_roles.filter_style: Provides tonal direction such as film, vintage, clean, cyber, grain, color temperature or contrast.

critical_requirements: Filter can only change color and tone.
Do not redraw faces, change background structure, replace clothing, add new objects or alter content.
negative_constraints: do not change image content or subject identity
no over-sharpening, overexposure, color cast or plastic texture
no new text, watermark, border or decoration unless requested

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Apply <filter_style> to edit_target_image while fully preserving subject identity, composition, scene, costume, props and narrative facts. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
